sourceMovie.title: Lightyear
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Lightyear for the same reason it broke through in 2022: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a science fiction rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Angus MacLane keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The animation and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Monsters vs Aliens
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Lightyear clicked for you, Monsters vs Aliens (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and science fiction, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Lightyear?
faq.answer: Try Monsters vs Aliens, Transformers One, Titan A.E.—each shares DNA with Lightyear while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Lightyear?
faq.answer: Lightyear (2022) is best described as Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Lightyear worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this animation lane.
